title: Pan-Seared Fish Tagine with Tunisian Flavors
description: A unique Japanese-inspired dish that combines the bold flavors of Tunisia with the delicate taste of fish. Pan-seared to perfection.

ingredients.name: Gently seasoned salt
ingredients.notes: Mix with other spices for added flavor

instructions: Season the fish fillets with gently seasoned salt, granulated sugar, and crushed red pepper flakes.
Dust the fish with flour, shaking off excess.
Heat the Tunisian flavored oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the fish for 2-3 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, sauté the chopped onion and bell pepper in a separate skillet until tender.
Stir in chopped cilantro and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the fish with the sautéed vegetables and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Garnish with additional cilantro, if desired.
